textByHash.4e9dd22a559eb077d459a37cd0e7b2a1499e1332: You have defeated me, human. Ask your questions.
textByHash.1adaea591d90e61c97a45a8a2ac882d97403e28c: Yu'biusk is far away. Beyond the icelands to the north, beyond the mountains to the west, beyond the oceans to the south and the deserts to the east.
textByHash.296c6a623bbf9b9cde86ffd1fe631942e48d70a6: But it is also close. Wherever goblins fight in the name of the Big High War God and their blood spills on the ground, Yu'biusk is close.
textByHash.473da9bbbf12ecff18b5196af86df78f3a74c1eb: My predecessor told me that no living goblin has ever gone to Yu'biusk. If no living goblin can go there, then perhaps the dead can.
textByHash.d1bb8565749894b5a0af58cbfc3b066c0fb8ee81: Strongbones. He was a mighty high priest and warrior of the Big High War God. It was he who learned the magic that allows us to be called up to speak with the living.
textByHash.6130b7a9fbab47e5c6412a472b42d5c71a883262: You are not a goblin high priest, so I had to see if you were worthy.
textByHash.f12345262f0ece7e019ed511e3d09a47a75ae1a9: I had thought perhaps I would go to Yu'biusk, to fight in endless battles for the Big High War God. Instead, there is only endless sleep.
textByHash.0fe59c6cd6c8a9519f95e3d00a672c7609774dbd: Good luck in your quest, human.
